assessments/index.title: Assessments Overview
assessments/index.description: This is the overview page for Assessments.

BRAND_USAGE.title: Brand Usage
BRAND_USAGE.description: - The project name and visual identity may not be used to impersonate the project.

CODE_OF_CONDUCT.title: Code of Conduct
CODE_OF_CONDUCT.description: As contributors and maintainers of this project, we pledge to respect all people who contribute through reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests or patches, and other activities.

CONTRIBUTING.title: Contributing
CONTRIBUTING.description: - Contributions should be educational, accurate, beginner-aware, and public-safe.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: This section addresses common questions about Goblin Quantum Lab, its mission, content, and how to get involved.

intro.title: Introduction to Goblin Quantum Lab
intro.description: Welcome to Goblin Quantum Lab, a free and open-source public quantum computing education project.

labs/faq.title: Lab FAQ
labs/faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Goblin Quantum Lab practical sessions.

labs/index.title: Labs Overview
labs/index.description: This is the overview page for Labs.

labs/setup.title: Lab Setup Guide
labs/setup.description: This guide provides instructions for setting up your local environment to run the Goblin Quantum Lab practical sessions.

learning-pathways/index.title: Learning Pathways Overview
learning-pathways/index.description: This is the overview page for Learning Pathways.

quantum-foundations/index.title: Quantum Foundations Overview
quantum-foundations/index.description: This is the overview page for Quantum Foundations.

report-writing/examples.title: Report Examples
report-writing/examples.description: This section provides examples of well-structured and comprehensive reports for various types of quantum computing projects.

report-writing/index.title: Report Writing
report-writing/index.description: Welcome to the Report Writing section. Here you'll learn to document your quantum computing experiments and findings in a clear, professional, and reproducible manner.

report-writing/templates.title: Report Templates
report-writing/templates.description: This section provides various templates to help you structure your quantum computing reports effectively.

report-writing/tips.title: Report Writing Tips
report-writing/tips.description: This section provides practical tips and best practices to help you write clear, concise, and effective quantum computing reports.

safety/conduct.title: Code of Conduct for Labs
safety/conduct.description: This document outlines the expected conduct within the Goblin Quantum Lab environment, specifically for practical lab sessions.

safety/index.title: Safety Overview
safety/index.description: This is the overview page for Safety and main safety page.

safety/reproducibility.title: Reproducibility Standards
safety/reproducibility.description: This document outlines the standards for ensuring reproducibility in all experiments and projects conducted within the Goblin Quantum Lab.

SECURITY.title: Security Policy
SECURITY.description: - Do not submit secrets or credentials.
